mapper.select: SELECT id, paper_id AS paperId, question_id AS questionId, question_type AS questionType, question_order AS questionOrder, score, question_snapshot AS questionSnapshot, create_time AS createTime FROM paper_question WHERE paper_id = #{paperId} ORDER BY question_order
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO paper_question (paper_id, question_id, question_type, question_order, score, question_snapshot) VALUES
(#{item.paperId}, #{item.questionId}, #{item.questionType}, #{item.questionOrder}, #{item.score}, #{item.questionSnapshot})
